title: Analytics - Device Connected
scenario: Verify that device connection events are logged and increment after toggling device power while the app is active, with Firebase displaying default elements plus Device PID and Serial.
steps: Open the app and ensure a device is successfully connected.
Check Firebase for the logged event.
Verify that the event count updates after a few hours.

Navigate to the Firebase page and confirm the following default elements are displayed: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
Additionally, confirm that Device PID and Device Serial are displayed.
Turn the device off and then on while the app is active.
Wait for some time and verify that the event count has incremented.
expected: Event is logged when a device is successfully connected. Firebase page displays default elements plus Device PID and Device Serial. Event count increments after turning the device off and on while the app is active.
